name: freelancers using QuickBooks processing 5–15 transactions/month tool
description: For freelancers using QuickBooks processing 5–15 transactions/month, manual categorization causes delays in financial reporting. We automate expense categorization instead of manual expense tracking and reporting.
problem_solved: Manual categorization of expenses is time-consuming and prone to errors.

locked_fields.primary_problem: Manual categorization of expenses is time-consuming and prone to errors.
locked_fields.mvp_wedge: For freelancers using QuickBooks processing 5–15 transactions/month, manual categorization causes delays in financial reporting. We automate expense categorization instead of manual expense tracking and reporting.
